ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (M/F) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Insurance provider and policy number of the patient */,
  "primary_care_doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient's primary care doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biometric_data" (
  "biometric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biometric record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the biometric data belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (M/F) */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height of the patient in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the patient in kilograms */,
  "fev_l" REAL /* Forced expiratory volume in liters */,
  "measured_date" TEXT /* Date the biometric data was measured */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last updated the biometric data */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body mass index of the patient */,
  "waist_circumference_cm" REAL /* Waist circumference of the patient in centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("biometric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biometric_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the health record belongs to */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis made during the visit */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the patient */,
  "prescribed_medication" TEXT /* Medications prescribed to the patient */,
  "date_of_visit" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who treated the patient */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., follow-up, emergency) */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms of the patient during the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the doctor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the doctor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the doctor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the doctor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the doctor */,
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinic the doctor works at */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Medical license number of the doctor */,
  "board_certification" TEXT /* Board certification of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doctors_clinic_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinic_id") REFERENCES clinics ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinics" (
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinic */,
  "clinic_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinic */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the clinic */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the clinic */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the clinic */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the clinic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle factor record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the lifestyle factors belong to */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient (e.g., non-smoker, smoker) */,
  "alcohol_use" TEXT /* Alcohol use of the patient (e.g., non-drinker, occasional, regular) */,
  "physical_activity_level" TEXT /* Physical activity level of the patient (e.g., sedentary, moderate, active) */,
  "dietary_habits" TEXT /* Dietary habits of the patient (e.g., balanced, high-fat, vegetarian) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the lifestyle factors were last updated */,
  "sleep_pattern" TEXT /* Sleep pattern of the patient (e.g., normal, irregular) */,
  "stress_level" TEXT /* Stress level of the patient (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_factors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the appointment is for */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor the patient is seeing */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the appointment */,
  "appointment_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the appointment */,
  "reminder_sent" INTEGER /* Whether a reminder was sent to the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication (e.g., once daily, twice daily) */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was prescribed */,
  "prescribed_by" TEXT /* ID of the doctor who prescribed the medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the medication is prescribed to */,
  "medication_side_effects" TEXT /* Potential side effects of the medication */,
  "refill_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication needs to be refilled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_prescribed_by FOREIGN KEY ("prescribed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the family history belongs to */,
  "relative_name" TEXT /* Name of the relative */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the patient (e.g., mother, father, sibling) */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the relative */,
  "age_of_onset" INTEGER /* Age of onset of the medical condition */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the relative was diagnosed with the medical condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_advisories" (
  "advisory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health advisory */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the advisory is for */,
  "advisory_date" TEXT /* Date the advisory was created */,
  "advisory_text" TEXT /* Text of the health advisory or recommendation */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the advisory */,
  "advisory_category" TEXT /* Category of the health advisory (e.g., nutrition, exercise) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_advisories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_advisories_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "allergies" (
  "allergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allergy */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the allergy */,
  "allergy_name" TEXT /* Name of the allergy */,
  "reaction" TEXT /* Description of the reaction to the allergy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allergies_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who received the vaccination */,
  "vaccination_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination was administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "lab_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who underwent the lab test */,
  "lab_test_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab test */,
  "lab_result" TEXT /* Result of the lab test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
